scriptLines:
query: 'SELECT DISTINCT
    p.ci                                            AS ci_beneficiaria,
    TRIM(p.nombres)                                 AS nombres,
    TRIM(p.apellido_paterno)                        AS primer_apellido,
    TRIM(p.apellido_materno)                        AS segundo_apellido,
    TRIM(p.nombres) + ' '
        + ISNULL(TRIM(p.apellido_paterno), '') + ' '
        + ISNULL(TRIM(p.apellido_materno), '')      AS nombre_completo,
    p.municipio_residencia                          AS municipio,
    geo.departamento,
    CASE WHEN i_sup.ci_beneficiaria IS NOT NULL
         THEN 1 ELSE 0 END                          AS en_sup,
    CASE WHEN i_bja.ci_beneficiaria IS NOT NULL
         THEN 1 ELSE 0 END                          AS en_bja,
    CASE WHEN spl.ci_beneficiaria IS NOT NULL
         THEN 1 ELSE 0 END                          AS en_spl
FROM silver.segip_personas p
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT municipio, departamento
    FROM silver.establecimientos_salud
) geo ON p.municipio_residencia = geo.municipio
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT ci_beneficiaria
    FROM silver.inscripciones_prenatal
    WHERE sistema_origen = 'SUP'
) i_sup ON p.ci = i_sup.ci_beneficiaria
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT ci_beneficiaria
    FROM silver.inscripciones_prenatal
    WHERE sistema_origen = 'BJA'
) i_bja ON p.ci = i_bja.ci_beneficiaria
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT ci_beneficiaria
    FROM silver.spl_afiliaciones
) spl ON p.ci = spl.ci_beneficiaria',
